summary.actionabilityPolicy: Actionable metrics count explicit actionablePick/officialPick/accuracyTargetEligible rows. Pass/no-pick rows remain graded for learning and all-scored diagnostics, but they are excluded from optimized accuracy-target proof so the 90% target measures only real display/official picks.

scoreLearning.policy: Learning blends four windows: current 24h, 7-day, 30-day, and season. Current 24h keeps the model responsive; longer windows stabilize signal scoring when sample size is sufficient.
scoreLearning.operationalTagFilterPolicy: Final-gate, provider, model-discipline, ML signal-layer, and status tags are kept on audit rows for proof, but removed from signal-learning inputs so the model only learns from predictive market/fundamentals signals.

rows.matchup: Boston Red Sox at Chicago White Sox

policy: Audit every completed MLB game in the trailing 24 hours. The optimizer target is correct team-winner selection for every individual game; 90% is measured as rolling 24h accuracy across all optimized picks. Signal scoring blends current 24h, 7-day, 30-day, and season audit trends.

modelSummary.policy: Use a lower ML threshold only when the guarded promotion policy validates at the target holdout accuracy; otherwise use the standard validated threshold.
